---
title: "04_advanced_model_1"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(forecast)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
```
## Preparing Data
```{r}
# Importing data
daily_data <- read_csv("../data_process/daily_data.csv")
template   <- read_csv("../data_raw/submission_template.csv")

daily_data <- daily_data %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

# Transforming data into time series object
ts_load <- ts(
  daily_data$load_daily,
  start = c(year(min(daily_data$date)), yday(min(daily_data$date))),
  frequency = 7
)
```

```{r}
h <- nrow(template)

#ETS
fit_ets <- ets(ts_load)
fc_ets <- forecast(fit_ets, h = h)
```

#Advanced model Output
```{r}
pred_final <- as.numeric(fc_ets$mean)

advanced_model <- template %>%
  mutate(load = pred_final)

# Exporting data
write_csv(advanced_model, "../data_process/advanced_model_1.csv")
```
